COLLEGE AU! Wolf Coil as always.. minor info on Skate, Boombox, and worldbuilding.

Eat up Coil simps your food is ready!! In my journey to become a support flex, I have never attempted to play Coil and I probably never will because I really don't have the motivation to learn an entirely new character, especially with his five star ahh difficulty. Speaking of that, I've heard someone say that Medkit should be four stars because of how hard he is. MEDKIT IS NOT HARD. You are putting him on the same level as Skateboard. All you have to do is hit head shots and learn who to pocket when ur playing!! It is actual agony.. but not because he's difficult to learn!! Trust!
